title: TruckTrace

images.alt: TruckTrace mobile app — freight logistics dashboard

overview.description: React Native customer app for freight logistics: quotes, live trip tracking, invoicing, and payments, built for the East African market.
overview.details:
TruckTrace is the customer-facing piece of a larger logistics platform. Users can register as individuals or companies, upload compliance documents, request quotes with map-based locations, follow active and completed trips, view invoices, record payments (cash, bank transfer, and planned mobile money), and open support tickets with in-app messaging.

Built with TypeScript, Expo Router, and React Native Paper, the app uses secure token storage, automatic JWT refresh, Firebase Cloud Messaging for trip and payment updates, and Google Maps / location services for routing workflows. Architecture is file-based routing, context for shared state, and modular API services across 40+ endpoints.

features: End-to-end quote → trip → invoice → payment flow for freight customers
Dual onboarding for individuals and companies (documents, bank details, verification)
Real-time trip tracking with status history and dashboard summaries
Map-based pickup/drop selection and location services
Invoice and payment management with partial payments and status tracking
Push notifications (FCM) for quotes, trips, and payments
Support tickets with chat-style conversations and attachments
Secure auth: OTP/login, JWT + refresh tokens, Expo Secure Store
Cross-platform Android & iOS via Expo / EAS builds
